description: Vision smoke-test fixtures for MiniCPM-V-2.6 via airframe shimmy_server_gpu

images.description: Shimmy dark web UI showing 'Waiting for WebSocket connection...' state. Header: 'shimmy-default' (top-left, bold). Green 'Connected' badge (top-right). Center: plug/fork icon + text 'Waiting for WebSocket connection...' Footer: 'Generated by Shimmy Theme Generator • Schema Version: •'. Dark background (#101827).
images.smoke_prompt: <image>What text appears in the center of this screen?

images.description: Full-screen dark loading screen. Center: blue arc spinner animation. Bold white text 'Discovering Shimmy Backend...' below spinner. Smaller grey subtext 'Looking for service on port 11430'. Very dark navy background (#0d1523), no other UI chrome.
images.smoke_prompt: <image>What is the main message shown on this screen and what port number is mentioned?

images.description: Shimmy model selection grid. Header: 'shimmy-default' (top-left) + green 'Connected' badge. Main heading 'Select a Model' with subtext 'Choose a model to start chatting. Models are loaded from your local Shimmy instance.' Blue 'Refresh Models' button. 3-column card grid showing: row 1: tinyllama:1.1b [Ollama], llama3.2:1b [Ollama], qwen2.5:1.5b [Ollama]; row 2 (partial): phi-3-mini-4k-instruct-q4, phi-3.5-moe-f16, phi3 [Ollama]. Each card has Parameters/Quantization/Context Length/Size/Type rows (all N/A) and a blue '🚀 Select Model' button.
images.smoke_prompt: <image>List the model names shown in the first row of model cards.

images.description: Shimmy retro console UI. Header: 'SHIMMY.AI CONSOLE v1.0' + '64-BIT RETRO EDITION' subtitle. Top-right tab bar: 'SIMPLE' (active, cyan border) and 'ADVANCED' (inactive). Inner panel header: 'SHIMMY' with three orange toggle buttons + red X button + 'CONNECTED gpt-oss-20b-f16' top-right in orange. Three message bubbles: aqua-bordered 'A: What is Rust?', orange-bordered 'A: ERROR: Failed to fetch', aqua-bordered 'A: Explain ownership in one sentence'. Bottom: input bar 'Type your message...' + orange 'SEND' button.
images.smoke_prompt: <image>What are the three messages visible in the chat area?
